message:
test(replication): add noreplicas and stale-replica integration tests

Add standalone test files exercising the min-replicas-to-write and
replica-serve-stale-data admission control paths introduced in recent
replication parity commits:

- fr-runtime/tests/noreplicas_test.rs: verifies that write commands are
  blocked when min-replicas-to-write is configured but no replicas have
  acknowledged, matching Redis NOREPLICAS error behavior
- fr-runtime/tests/stale_replica_test.rs: verifies that read commands
  are blocked when the replica is configured with replica-serve-stale-data=no
  and the link to the master is down, matching Redis MASTERDOWN error
- fr-server/tests/noreplicas_test.rs: server-layer variant of the
  noreplicas write admission test using RuntimePolicy configuration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
